title: EPP blames Socialists after siding with far right on return hubs
summary_full: The European Parliament’s civil liberties committee (LIBE) approved compromise amendments to the returns regulation tabled by EPP shadow rapporteur François-Xavier Bellamy
summary_public: The European Parliament’s civil liberties committee (LIBE) approved compromise amendments to the returns regulation tabled by EPP shadow rapporteur François-Xavier Bellamy
